questionsList.questionContent: The Book of Proverbs opens: 'The proverbs of Solomon son of David, king of ___.'
According to Proverbs 1:7, what is 'the beginning of knowledge'?
According to Proverbs 16:18 (NIV), what 'goes before destruction'?
Proverbs 3:5 says: 'Trust in the LORD with all your heart and lean not on your own ___.'
What does Proverbs 15:1 (NIV) say 'turns away wrath'?
What does Proverbs 22:1 (NIV) say is 'more desirable than great riches'?
Which creature does Proverbs 6 hold up as a model of diligence for the lazy person?
Proverbs 17:22 (NIV) states: 'A cheerful heart is ___.'
Proverbs 4:23 (NIV) commands: 'Above all else, guard your ___.'
Proverbs 9:10 says 'knowledge of the Holy One' brings what?
Proverbs 10:1 says a wise son brings joy to his father, but a foolish son brings grief to whom?
What does Proverbs 18:10 call 'the name of the LORD'?
According to Proverbs 26:11 (NIV), a fool who repeats his folly is like what?

answersList.value: A moth drawn to the flame
A dog returning to its vomit
A bird returning to its cage
A fish caught in the same net

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 28:13 says that one who confesses and renounces their sins finds what?
What does Proverbs 3:12 say the LORD does to those He loves?
How many things does Proverbs 6:16-19 list as 'detestable' to the LORD?
Proverbs 27:1 warns: 'Do not boast about tomorrow, for you do not know what a ___ may bring.'
What does Proverbs 13:3 say 'guarding your lips' preserves?
What does Proverbs 15:3 say about 'the eyes of the LORD'?

answersList.value: They are fixed on those who fear Him

questionsList.questionContent: In Proverbs 21:9, it is better to live where than with a quarrelsome wife?

answersList.value: Among strangers in a foreign land
On a corner of the roof
In the house of a neighbour

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 22:6 say will happen when a child is trained in the right way, 'even when they are old'?

answersList.value: They will not turn from it
They will be a light to others

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 25:1, the proverbs of Solomon in chapters 25–29 were compiled by the men of whom?
What does Proverbs 20:1 call beer (alongside calling wine a 'mocker')?
According to Proverbs 21:23, guarding your 'mouth and tongue' keeps you from what?
What does Proverbs 10:12 say love covers?
How many times does Proverbs 24:16 say the righteous person falls, yet rises again?
According to Proverbs 15:29, the LORD 'hears the prayer' of whom?

answersList.value: Those who seek His face early

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 13:24 says 'whoever spares the rod' actually does what to their children?
In Proverbs 9:1, who built a house, hewn out its seven pillars, and sent out an invitation to a feast?
What does Proverbs 26:20 say will happen 'without wood'?
According to Proverbs 16:9, a person plans his course, but who 'determines his steps'?
What does Proverbs 11:2 (NIV) say comes 'with the proud'?
Proverbs 31:30 says a woman who fears the LORD is to be what?
According to Proverbs 12:10, what does a 'righteous man' care for?
Proverbs 3:9 says to honour the LORD with your wealth and with the ___ of all your crops.
Proverbs 31:10 says a wife of noble character 'is worth far more than ___.'
Proverbs 17:17 says a friend loves at all times, and a brother is born for what?
Proverbs 14:12 warns: 'There is a way that appears to be right, but in the end it leads to ___.'
Proverbs 3:6 promises that if you 'submit to God in all your ways,' He will do what?
In Proverbs 31, whose children 'arise and call her blessed' while her husband praises her?

answersList.value: Lady Wisdom at the city gate

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 20:29 say is 'the glory of young men'?
What does Proverbs 23:13 say you should not do to a child regarding discipline?
According to Proverbs 6:31, if a thief is caught, how much must he pay back?
Proverbs 18:24 says 'there is a friend who sticks closer than a ___.'
According to Proverbs 15:33, what 'comes before honour'?
Proverbs 4:7 (NIV) says: 'The beginning of wisdom is this: ___ wisdom.'
According to Proverbs 31:27, what does the wife of noble character do regarding the affairs of her household?

answersList.value: She delegates them to trusted servants
She plans them carefully each morning

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 1:20-21, where does Lady Wisdom raise her voice and call out?
What does Proverbs 3:7 warn you NOT to be?
According to Proverbs 10:7, 'the memory of the righteous' is described as what?
According to Proverbs 8:30, how did Wisdom respond while present with God at creation?

answersList.value: With awe at the immensity of all created things
By ordering the depths and setting the foundations
With delight, rejoicing before Him always
By singing praise with the morning stars

questionsList.questionContent: In Proverbs 7:22, the young man drawn astray by the adulteress is compared to which animal being led to slaughter?
Proverbs 5:3-4 warns that the adulteress's lips 'drip honey,' but in the end she is as bitter as what?
In Proverbs 9:17, what does Lady Folly say about 'stolen water'?

answersList.value: It runs dry in the end

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 10:26 compares a sluggard sent on an errand to what combination (NIV)?

answersList.value: Thorns under a pot and smoke in the eyes
Flood at harvest and drought at planting
A heavy stone and a freezing wind
Vinegar to the teeth and smoke to the eyes

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 26:27 say will happen to anyone who 'digs a pit'?

answersList.value: His enemies will discover it first
It becomes a trap for his children

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 25:16 warn you not to eat too much of, lest you vomit it?
According to Proverbs 11:14, what happens to a nation that has no 'guidance'?

answersList.value: It stumbles and loses its way

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 14:4, where there are no oxen, what is the manger?
Proverbs 16:32 says what is 'better than' a warrior who takes a city?

answersList.value: Being slow to anger and ruling your own spirit
A friend faithful in the day of battle

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 5:15 urges a young man to be satisfied with his own wife using what image?

answersList.value: A stream flowing through the wilderness
Drinking from your own cistern and well
A garden enclosed by strong walls
The shade of a tree you planted yourself

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 25:11 compares 'a word aptly spoken' to what?

answersList.value: Apples of gold in settings of silver
Cool water on a burning-hot day
A lamp shining in a dark place

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 13:12, what does a 'longing fulfilled' become?
According to Proverbs 25:21, if your enemy is hungry, what should you do?

answersList.value: Avoid him until he repents of his ways
Bring his need before the authorities

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 23:29-30 associates lingering over wine with which of these?

answersList.value: Foolish speech and the loss of all wealth

questionsList.questionContent: In Proverbs 8:25, before the mountains were settled, what had already happened to Wisdom?

answersList.value: She had been brought forth by God
She had sung praises with the angels
She had walked through all creation
She had been hidden in the depths

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 27:17 says, 'As iron sharpens iron, so one person sharpens ___.'
What does Proverbs 19:17 say about showing kindness to the poor?

answersList.value: It reflects the wisdom of a generous heart
It stores up treasure for the days of need
It is lending to the LORD

questionsList.questionContent: In Proverbs 30:8, Agur asked God to give him neither poverty nor riches, but what?

answersList.value: Only wisdom and a peaceful life

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 19:21 says many are the plans in a person's heart, but what will prevail?
Proverbs 11:22 compares a beautiful woman who shows no discretion to what?

answersList.value: Fine wine poured into a broken jar
A gold ring in a pig's snout
A lamp placed under a basket

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 12:4 call a wife who 'brings shame' on her husband?

answersList.value: A storm in the midst of calm

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 14:13 says that even in laughter, what may be present in the heart?
What does Proverbs 16:24 (NIV) compare 'gracious words' to?

answersList.value: Cool water on a thirsty soul

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 27:6 say about 'wounds from a friend'?

answersList.value: They heal slower than wounds from an enemy
They should be borne without complaint

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 21:1 says the king's heart is like what in the LORD's hand?

answersList.value: A flame He fans or quenches at will
A vessel He fills or empties
A watercourse He directs as He pleases
A stone He shapes with precision

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 14:34 say 'righteousness' does for a nation?
Proverbs 25:14 compares 'clouds and wind without rain' to what kind of person?

answersList.value: A ruler who fails to deliver
One who boasts of gifts never given
A friend who offers help but disappears
A preacher who speaks but does not live it

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 26:17 compares meddling in a quarrel not your own to what action?

answersList.value: A fool who answers before listening
A man who lights another person's fire
A dog that bites its own master
One who grabs a stray dog by the ears

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 13:11, what happens to wealth gained hastily?

answersList.value: It is spent before it is fully counted
It brings trouble to the household

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 30:24-28 lists four creatures that are 'extremely wise.' Which of the following is NOT among them?
Proverbs 23:5 warns that riches you set your eyes on will do what?

answersList.value: Corrupt your heart and cloud your judgment
Sprout wings and fly away like an eagle
Slip through your fingers like water
Bring sorrow to all who chase them

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 20:27 call 'the lamp of the LORD' that 'sheds light on one's inmost being'?
Proverbs 17:1 says what is 'better than a house full of feasting, with strife'?

answersList.value: A simple meal shared in perfect honesty
A quiet day spent in honest work
A dry crust eaten in peace and quiet
A small loaf baked by one's own hand

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 14:30 say 'envy' does to the bones?
Proverbs 29:18 says that where there is 'no revelation,' people do what?

answersList.value: The nation strays from the truth

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 20:17 say about 'food gained by fraud'?

answersList.value: It fills the stomach but empties the soul
It tastes like ashes in the end
It brings swift ruin on the one who eats it
It tastes sweet but turns to gravel in the mouth

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 25:25 compares 'good news from a distant land' to what?

answersList.value: Morning light after a long night
A lamp burning through the darkness
Cold water to a weary soul

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 19:11 say 'overlooking an offence' demonstrates about a person?
What danger does Proverbs 26:4 warn about when answering a fool according to his folly?

answersList.value: You yourself will become like him
You will only deepen his foolishness
You will lose the respect of the wise

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 16:33, the lot is cast into the lap, but whose is 'every decision'?
What does Proverbs 25:2 say is 'the glory of God' (contrasted with the glory of kings)?

answersList.value: His wisdom that no one can fathom
His power over all of creation

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 17:22, what 'dries up the bones' (contrasted with a cheerful heart)?
What does Proverbs 18:21 say has the power of 'life and death'?
Proverbs 23:17-18 urges not to envy sinners but to fear the LORD, because what?

answersList.value: The wicked will soon receive judgment
Your righteousness will be openly rewarded
God sees and records every secret deed
There is surely a future hope for you

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 13:20 say happens to one who 'walks with the wise'?

answersList.value: They find favour with God and man
They walk in the path of life

questionsList.questionContent: In Proverbs 30:15-16, four things are listed as 'never satisfied.' Which of the following is one of them?
According to Proverbs 31:6-7, wine and strong drink should be given to whom?

answersList.value: Those who are perishing and in anguish
The poor with nothing else to eat

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 22:29 say will happen to a person who is 'skilled in their work'?

answersList.value: They will find favour with all people
They will always have enough for their needs

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 15:17 say is 'better than a fattened calf with hatred'?

answersList.value: Simple food with a pure heart
A meal of vegetables where there is love

questionsList.questionContent: In Proverbs 30:29-31, among the four things that 'move with stately bearing,' which creature is described as 'strutting'?
Proverbs 8:22-23 says Wisdom was 'brought forth' by the LORD — at what point?

answersList.value: When the first star was set in place
When God first spoke creation into being
At the very beginning, before His works of old
When the morning stars sang together

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 30:15, the leech has two daughters. What do they both cry?
Proverbs 30:18-19 lists four things 'too amazing' for Agur to understand. Which of the following is NOT one of them?

answersList.value: The way of an eagle in the sky
The way of a snake on a rock
The way of a lion in the wilderness
The way of a ship on the high seas

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 6:5 urges someone who has rashly pledged security to free themselves — like what?

answersList.value: A bird escaping through the open window
A gazelle from the hand of the hunter
A deer fleeing from a roaring lion
A fish leaping free of the net

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 27:20 says 'the eyes of man are never satisfied' — comparing them to what?

answersList.value: The depths of the ocean and the restless sea
The heart of the proud and the arrogant
The craving of the unrestrained glutton

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 30:10 warn will happen if you 'slander a servant to their master'?

answersList.value: Your slander will be brought before the city elders
The whole household will be turned against you
The servant will curse you, and you will pay for it
The servant will repay you with false testimony

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 25:3 compares 'the height of the heavens' and 'the depth of the earth' to what?

answersList.value: The love of a faithful parent
The patience of the long-suffering man

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 16:15, when the king's face 'brightens,' it is like what?

answersList.value: The rising of the morning sun
The freshness of the early dew

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 25:23, a north wind brings unexpected rain — and a sly tongue brings what?

answersList.value: Words no one can take back

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 11:1 say the LORD finds 'detestable'?

answersList.value: A false witness who tells lies
A man who stirs up conflict

questionsList.questionContent: In Proverbs 7:9, at what time of day does the adulteress approach the naive young man?

answersList.value: At twilight, as the evening came on
At noon, when the sun was at its height
Before dawn, when all the house was quiet
In the deep of the night watch

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 12:16 say a fool does when he perceives an insult?

answersList.value: He shows his annoyance at once
He raises his voice in open anger
He makes his grievance known to all

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 26:23 compare to 'an earthen vessel covered with silver dross'?

answersList.value: Beautiful words spoken from a hollow heart
Wisdom learned but never put into practice
Fervent lips with a wicked heart

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 27:7, what happens to a hungry person when they encounter something bitter?

answersList.value: Even what is bitter tastes sweet
They will take what they need wherever they find it
They lose the ability to judge what is truly good

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 22:2 say the rich and the poor have in common?

answersList.value: They both seek wisdom in their own way
The LORD is the Maker of them all
They both stand before God in judgment
They share the same daily needs

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 17:14 compares 'starting a quarrel' to what potentially catastrophic act?

answersList.value: Kindling a fire in a drought

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 20:5 says the purposes of a person's heart are like deep waters — but who can draw them out?

answersList.value: A trusted elder in the community
One who has endured great suffering

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 25:20 compares singing songs to a heavy heart to what two images?

answersList.value: Offering advice before understanding the problem
Laughing at the sorrows of a grieving friend
Taking away a garment on a cold day, or vinegar poured on a wound
Telling a man in grief to count his many blessings

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 26:7 compares 'a proverb in the mouth of a fool' to what?

answersList.value: A harp played by hands without skill
A straight arrow from a badly bent bow
The legs of the lame that hang limp
A fig on a dead branch

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 24:11 command concerning those 'being led away to death'?

answersList.value: Alert the righteous among the city elders

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 27:3, stone is heavy and sand is a burden — but what is 'heavier than both'?

answersList.value: A guilty conscience pressing through the night
The grief of a father over a wayward child

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 5:22 say will happen to the wicked man because of his own iniquities?

answersList.value: They reveal his heart to all who observe him
They become a burden that bends him to the ground

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 30:21-23 lists four things 'the earth cannot bear.' Which of the following is NOT one of them?

answersList.value: A godless fool who gets plenty to eat
A contemptible woman who gets married
A young man who suddenly gains great wealth

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 8:35 says that those who find Wisdom receive what alongside 'favour from the LORD'?
Proverbs 30:33 uses churning cream and twisting a nose as analogies for what outcome?

answersList.value: Pressing a friend brings hidden secrets to light
Testing a person reveals their true character

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 16:26 say about the appetite of a labourer?

answersList.value: It drives him to seek more than he truly needs
It works for him — his hunger urges him on
It is never fully satisfied by honest toil
It is a gift from God to keep him dependent

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 21:14, what 'soothes great wrath'?

answersList.value: An honest rebuke from a trusted friend

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 11:29 say the one who 'brings trouble on his family' will inherit?

answersList.value: Ruin upon his children after him
The loss of everything he built

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 26:2 uses two birds to illustrate that an 'undeserved curse' does what?

answersList.value: Falls back on the one who spoke it
Is turned into blessing by the LORD

questionsList.questionContent: In Proverbs 12:17, an honest witness 'tells the truth' — but what does a false witness do?

answersList.value: Uses flattery to deceive the judge

questionsList.questionContent: In Proverbs 5:19, Solomon describes the joy of a man's own wife using what image?

answersList.value: A garden watered by your own spring
A loving doe and a graceful deer
A rose planted in your own vineyard

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 19:12 compare to 'a king's rage'?
What principle does Proverbs 24:27 teach about establishing a household?

answersList.value: First honour your parents and secure their blessing
First acquire a good name before laying the foundations
First prepare your fields, then build your house

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 20:19 say a gossip does?

answersList.value: Destroys families with a single careless word
Cannot be trusted with any matter at all

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 22:25 warn may happen if you associate with a hot-tempered person?

answersList.value: Their anger will eventually be turned on you
You will be blamed for the trouble they create
They will draw you into their conflicts
You may learn their ways and ensnare yourself

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 14:10 say about the bitterness and joy of the heart?

answersList.value: Both are known in their fullness only by God
Grief always runs deeper than joy can reach
Each heart knows its own bitterness, and no one else can share its joy
The heart hides what the face so plainly reveals

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 30:5, 'every word of God' is described as what?

answersList.value: Life to those who find it

questionsList.questionContent: In Proverbs 7:20, the adulteress says her husband has gone on a long journey and taken what with him?

answersList.value: His servants and the whole household
All provisions enough for many months

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 29:23 say humility ultimately brings to a person?

answersList.value: Protection from the destruction of pride

questionsList.questionContent: What analogy does Proverbs 24:13-14 use to urge a young man to seek wisdom?

answersList.value: The usefulness of oil in every season of life
The nourishment of fresh bread in the morning

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 26:8 compares 'giving honour to a fool' to what?

answersList.value: Praising a man who does not deserve it
Trusting a message to an unreliable man
Tying a stone in a sling

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 27:14, what is said about 'loudly blessing your neighbour early in the morning'?

answersList.value: It shows a striking lack of wisdom and care
It will be taken as a curse
It breeds envy among all those nearby

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 25:26 compares 'a righteous person who gives way to the wicked' to what?

answersList.value: A muddied spring or a polluted well
A fire smothered before it warms the house
A lamp extinguished before the journey ends

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 28:2, what does a ruler with 'discernment and knowledge' do?

answersList.value: Maintains order for a long time
Wins the love and loyalty of the people
Receives the blessing of the Most High

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 22:11, who 'will have the king for a friend' (NIV)?

answersList.value: One who is mighty and skilled in counsel
One who serves the king with complete loyalty
One who loves a pure heart and speaks with grace
One who always brings the king good news

questionsList.questionContent: What does Proverbs 30:17 say will happen to the eye that 'mocks a father' and 'scorns a mother'?

answersList.value: It will be struck blind before its time
It will see only darkness in old age
It will weep with bitter tears of lasting regret
It will be pecked out by ravens and eaten by vultures

questionsList.questionContent: According to Proverbs 21:3, what is 'more acceptable to the LORD than sacrifice'?

answersList.value: To do what is right and just
A life lived in quiet and faithful obedience
Prayer offered in sincerity and truth

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 26:18-19 compares the person who deceives a neighbour then says 'I was only joking' to what?

answersList.value: A maniac shooting deadly flaming arrows
A fool who sets fire to dry straw
A drunkard stumbling through the dark
A child playing carelessly with sharp stones

questionsList.questionContent: Proverbs 11:30 says the fruit of the righteous is a tree of life, and 'the one who is wise' does what?

answersList.value: Walks always in paths that lead to life
Speaks words that heal and restore the broken
